system_boundary.name: Polar
system_boundary.description: Open source payment infrastructure platform for developers — merchant of record handling billing, subscriptions, digital products, and tax compliance.

containers.name: API Server
containers.description: FastAPI REST API serving all backend endpoints, authentication, and business logic.

containers.name: Background Worker
containers.description: Dramatiq worker processing async jobs: webhook delivery, payment callbacks, email sending, and scheduled tasks.

containers.name: Web Dashboard
containers.description: Next.js merchant-facing dashboard for managing products, subscriptions, orders, and analytics.

containers.name: Backoffice
containers.description: Internal admin UI mounted as a sub-application within the API server, using HTMX and DaisyUI.

containers.name: Email Renderer
containers.description: Node.js service that compiles and renders transactional email templates.

external_systems.name: Stripe
external_systems.description: Payment processor handling charges, subscriptions, and payouts.

external_systems.name: GitHub
external_systems.description: Used for OAuth authentication and repository-based benefit grants.

external_systems.name: PostgreSQL
external_systems.description: Primary relational database storing all business entities.

external_systems.name: Redis
external_systems.description: Cache and message broker for Dramatiq background job queues.

external_systems.name: S3-compatible Storage
external_systems.description: Object storage for file uploads, invoices, and downloadable content.

relationships.description: Fetches data and submits actions via REST API.
Reads and writes all business entities.
Enqueues background jobs and caches data.
Stores and retrieves files, invoices, and downloadable content.
Creates payment intents, manages subscriptions, and processes payouts.
Authenticates users via OAuth, manages repository access benefits.
Reads and writes data during background job processing.
Processes payment callbacks and subscription updates.
Queries data for internal admin views.

people_container_mappings.description: Manages products, views analytics, and configures integrations.
Accesses customer portal to manage subscriptions and downloads.
Integrates via REST API and SDK for programmatic access.
